perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a striped shirt and green apron stands in a modern kitchen introducing 3COINS kitchen gadgets. (2) She demonstrates a microwave rice cooker by adding rice, washing it at the sink, adding water, and placing it in the microwave. (3) She shows a dual-compartment container used to make tamagoyaki (rolled egg), cracking eggs, seasoning them, and microwaving. (4) She uses a steaming dish to cook broccoli and green beans in the microwave. (5) She introduces a 2-way oil dispenser, demonstrating both the spray and pour functions while frying an egg. (6) Beef slices are seasoned and cooked in the microwave using the steaming dish. (7) She assembles all the prepared components—rice, beef, eggs, and vegetables—into a white bento box and shows the final result to the camera with a smile.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately. A young woman's voice is heard speaking in Mandarin with an energetic and friendly tone. (2) Sound effects such as water running, plastic lids clicking, and 'ding' sounds for microwave completion are integrated with the music. (3) The woman provides a continuous commentary/narration on the cooking steps. (4) The background music remains consistent in volume and energy until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '3COINS 好物分享' (3COINS Goodies Sharing) - Hook text at the top. (2) '很多人說我沒時間煮' (Many people say I don't have time to cook) - Functional subtitle. (3) Instructional steps: '加米', '加水', '洗米', '倒水', '浸泡', '微波' (Add rice, water, wash, pour, soak, microwave). (4) '飯好了' (Rice is ready) - Functional text. (5) Tamagoyaki steps: '打蛋', '攪拌', '調味', '成形', '切片完成' (Crack eggs, stir, season, shape, slicing done). (6) Vegetable steps: '清洗後放入', '加點水', '蓋上蓋子', '進去微波', '小心燙手', '完成' (Wash, add water, lid on, microwave, watch for heat, complete). (7) '好物推薦 噴倒兩用油罐' (Goodie recommendation: 2-way spray/pour oil bottle) - Promotional hook. (8) '擺盤擺盤擺盤' (Plating plating plating) - Playful decorative text. (9) '只有微波爐也可以煮出超可愛便當' (You can cook a super cute bento with just a microwave) - Closing summary text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Step-by-step product demonstrations -> Final assembly and result

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a black and white horizontally striped shirt and a green overall-style apron.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen featuring white tiled walls, light wood cabinetry, a grey countertop, and a built-in microwave and oven.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Multiple Demonstration Modules -> Synthesis -> Final Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the efficiency and convenience of 3COINS kitchen gadgets for preparing a healthy meal quickly. The video aims to inspire busy viewers by showing that a full bento can be made using only a microwave and specialized affordable tools.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video starts with a brand-specific title '3COINS 好物分享' and the entire content is focused on showcasing their product line.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density text overlays, green apron visual identity, upbeat 'life hack' style editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video fits perfectly into the 'efficiency-hack' trend on social media, targeting working professionals or students with limited cooking facilities or time.
